issue_title: Board fails to load after login (refresh required)
issue_body_preview:
__Describe the Bug__

Given I am signed off, when I log in, the board fails to load and I have to refresh the page. It works fine afterwards.

I checked the developer tools and found this message:

```
service-worker.js:1 Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to execute 'put' on 'Cache': Re
test_description_zh: 在未登录状态下，执行登录操作后，观察看板页面是否能正常加载并显示内容，无需手动刷新页面。
expected_result_zh: 用户登录成功后，看板页面应自动加载并正确显示所有内容，无需手动刷新浏览器即可正常使用。
